title: Gym Membership
context: You want to join a gym near your home and are speaking with the front desk staff. Ask about membership plans, class schedules, and facilities. Mention your fitness goals and preferred workout times.
user_role: A customer choosing a gym membership for regular exercise
agent_role: A fitness center receptionist explaining plans and services
opening_prompt: Hi, welcome to FitZone Gym. Are you interested in a membership, or would you like a quick tour first?
